static.value: PNTHR Funds, Carnivore Quant Fund, LP

Shows the reconciliation between the administrator-reported and the broker-reported cash balance and market value of the Fund. Any discrepancies in reported values are broken down by category and reflected in the last six columns of the report.
This is a currency-wise broker account level report.
Highlights the top 10 Gainers and Decliners of the Fund’s investments based on their month-to-date and year-to-date performance. The trading income/loss includes realized and unrealized P&L.
This report shows data at security level.
Breaks down exposure and performance of the Fund’s portfolio by Sector, Sub Sector, Country, Product Type, and Asset Class attributes.

Reflects market price, date, and source of price used by NAV to calculate the Fund’s net asset value, and compares market prices used by NAV to those used by the broker to highlight any pricing differences.
This is a security based report.

Shows gain/loss of each security—including realized and unrealized P&L, interest income/expense, and dividend income/expense—in the Fund’s portfolio for the given period. Does not factor in operating expenses, management fees, or performance fees for the Fund.
This report is a broker account-wise security-based report.
Displays the open individual tax lots of each security, and shows quantity, open date, open price, current market price, and unrealized gain/loss on each open tax lot. This is a tax lot-based report.
Shows the realized gain/loss of each tax lot during a given period and the bifurcation between short-term and long-term gains/losses. This is a tax lot-based report.
Displays security-wise interest income/expense for a given period, beginning receivable/payable, interest received/paid during the given period, and ending receivable/payable.
Show security-wise dividend income/expense for a given period, beginning receivable/payable, dividend received/paid during the given period, and ending receivable/payable and tax withholding.
Shows discrepancies between client and broker reported trades.
Provides details of trades for which cash will be settled in future.
Provides details of unidentified cash flows within the brokerage account.
PNTHR Funds, Carnivore Quant Fund, LP
*Trade Pending Cash : Trade amount for which cash will be settled in future
